query.sql: SELECT 'Open' as stage, COUNT(*) as value FROM hrm_recruitment WHERE status = 'Open' UNION ALL SELECT 'Screening', COUNT(*) FROM hrm_recruitment WHERE status = 'Screening' UNION ALL SELECT 'Interviewing', COUNT(*) FROM hrm_recruitment WHERE status = 'Interviewing' UNION ALL SELECT 'Offer', COUNT(*) FROM hrm_recruitment WHERE status = 'Offer' UNION ALL SELECT 'Closed', COUNT(*) FROM hrm_recruitment WHERE status = 'Closed'

option.raw: const data = (() => { const raw = ctx.data; if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.objects)) return raw.objects; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.data)) return raw.data; return []; })(); if (data.length === 0) { return { title: { text: 'No Data', left: 'center', top: 'center', textStyle: { color: '#999', fontSize: 14 } } }; } const order = ['Open', 'Screening', 'Interviewing', 'Offer', 'Closed']; const sorted = order.map(s => { const found = data.find(d => d.stage === s); return { name: s, value: found ? parseInt(found.value) || 0 : 0 }; }); return { title: { text: 'Recruitment Pipeline', left: 'center', textStyle: { fontSize: 14 } }, tooltip: { trigger: 'item', formatter: '{b}: {c}' }, series: [{ type: 'funnel', left: '10%', top: 50, bottom: 20, width: '80%', sort: 'none', gap: 2, label: { show: true, position: 'inside', formatter: '{b}\n{c}' }, itemStyle: { borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#fff' }, data: sorted, color: ['#3b82f6', '#f59e0b', '#10b981', '#8b5cf6', '#6b7280'] }] };
